One terrorist regime cannot simply be replaced by another.

Cautious days ahead.

Video

posts.text:
When the world becomes dangerous, leadership becomes a question of character, not convenience.

We saw it firsthand in Israel. We saw it in the volunteers risking everything to evacuate strangers. We saw it in Grey Bull Rescue and we saw it in the faces of 155 Americans boarding a plane to safety.

This is what our nation is capable of when we refuse to give up on our people.
posts.quote:

posts.text:
Today we pray for the 2,500 Marines sent to the Middle East, for their families, and for their safety and the success of their mission.

May God watch over every American service member standing in harm’s way and guide our nation’s leaders with courage, clarity, and a commitment to peace through strength.

God bless our troops and God bless the United States of America. 🇺🇸🙏

posts.text:
There are two sexes: male and female.

And yet, the federal government has been cluttering official forms and surveys with gender identity options rooted in ideology, not biology.

We introduced the Restoring Biological Truth in Government Act so every executive agency, department, military branch, and government corporation is prohibited from asking about gender identity, prohibited from offering any option other than male or female when asking about sex or gender, and required to reject any re

posts.text:
We work for the American people, we will stop at nothing to help the American people, whether you are in South Carolina or thousands of miles away.

Grey Bull Rescue has saved over 8,000 people, but we need funding, we need planes, and we need more leaders willing to step up to bring our people home.

Video

posts.text:
The last thing we want is South Carolinians going over seas to the Middle East to fight in a forever war.

We are relying on our air support and the superiority of our military to do what is necessary and get out.

Video
posts.quote:

posts.text:
We brought the attention. Washington listened. God provided.

More planes. More evacuations. More Americans coming home from the Middle East.

Thank you to the @StateDept, El Al Airlines and every embassy working tirelessly for our people.

This is what America does. We do not abandon our own. We do not look away. We do not wait. No man, woman, or child left behind.

@greybullrescue

Video

posts.text:
These are OUR people. Americans who cannot get home.

They are being turned away because there aren't enough seats on a plane and there aren't enough planes.

I will not rest until every American who wants to go home gets home.

Video

posts.text:
I also want to thank Heroes 4 Humanity and Untrafficked for operational security while I was on the ground, and for keeping me alive.

You are truly doing the Lord’s work in the spiritual battle between good and evil. 🙏

posts.text:
🚨AMERICAN CITIZENS NEED HELP EVACUATING🚨
If we can get more planes or get money for more planes, we can evacuate every single remaining American. DM or text 843.475.9139 - if any airline can donate a plane to fly transatlantic - or if there is money to charter the flights necessary - we can get the remaining Americans out. Grey Bull has manifests, they know where AmCits are, and they can do this quickly and securely. 

I pray for the safety of every American left behind.

posts.text:
My love for South Carolina and all Americans knows no boundaries. 

We will cross oceans, fly into war zones and do everything humanly possible to help you. When our people are in need, we step up.

Video
posts.quote:
My love for South Carolina and all Americans knows no boundaries.

Video

posts.text:
While in the Middle East, we connected with Bryan Stern, Founder and Chairman of Grey Bull Rescue. What his team has built is extraordinary. We joined their 808th mission and brought 155 Americans home, including 11 babies.

Grey Bull Rescue is a veteran-led and donor funded nonprofit dedicated to saving Americans from warzones and disaster areas. They go to the places where traditional aid cannot reach to do real ground work.

Alone, they've saved over 8000 people from all over the world, globa

posts.text:
There are THOUSANDS of Americans stranded in Israel and across the Middle East right now.

We need more planes and more resources to get them out.

More on this soon.

Video

posts.text:
What I saw in the Middle East will stay with me forever. The courage of volunteers running toward danger. The relief on the faces of families finally heading home.

Leadership is not a title. Leadership is stepping up in real time, under pressure, when lives depend on it. 🇺🇸
posts.quote:

posts.text: THOUSANDS still stranded. If we had the planes we could get them out in no time. @greybullrescue
posts.quote: THOUSANDS still stranded. If we had the planes we could get them out in no time. @greybullrescue

posts.text:
While I was in the Middle East this week I asked for transatlantic plane(s) to get Americans to America. They wouldn’t give me even one.

There are thousands still stranded, begging for help. We were turning Americans away last night. Pregnant mothers. Babies. Students. Because the plane I was able to secure could only seat 140. We got 155 on it by putting kids on laps. And it would only go to Athens, Greece. 

Punch to the gut.

Almost 200 South Carolinians and Americans, men, women and children, rescued from the Middle East (3 different missions).

Video
